column1: # FX Component Tests – Payment Identification Field Boundaries

column3: UETR: valid v4 UUID lowercase - VALID
UETR: not v4 (3rd group starts with 1 not 4) - INVALID
UETR: invalid variant (4th group starts with c not 89ab) - INVALID
UETR: uppercase hex (pattern requires lowercase) - INVALID
